## Install Sly Fox Translator beta

1. Download the attached `sly-fox-translator-...-unpacked.zip` file.
2. Double-click it to unzip it.
3. In Chrome, open `chrome://extensions`.
4. Turn on **Developer mode** in the top-right corner.
5. Click **Load unpacked**.
6. Select the unzipped folder containing `manifest.json`.

The Sly Fox icon will appear in Chrome's extensions menu. Pin it if you want it in the toolbar.

This is a temporary beta-install method while the Chrome Web Store listing is under review.
